flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Minneapolis Community and Technical College are 12% below the public associate's-predominant peer median ($40.1k vs $45.7k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Minneapolis Community and Technical College fell 53% between 2006 and 2009 (19.1% → 9.0%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Minneapolis Community and Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.3% → 0.0%).
